'''choyajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wraggled|wraggled]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wraggled|wraggled]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| choyajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyajithi|choyajithi]] || [[word:choyajiji|choyajiji]] || [[word:choyajishi|choyajishi]] || [[word:choyajiki|choyajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyajuthuthu|choyajuthuthu]] || [[word:choyajujuju|choyajujuju]] || [[word:choyajushushu|choyajushushu]] || [[word:choyajukuku|choyajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyajuthu|choyajuthu]] || [[word:choyajuju|choyajuju]] || [[word:choyajushu|choyajushu]] || [[word:choyajuku|choyajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyajufthuf|choyajufthuf]] || [[word:choyajufjuf|choyajufjuf]] || [[word:choyajufshuf|choyajufshuf]] || [[word:choyajufkuf|choyajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyajethe|choyajethe]] || [[word:choyajeje|choyajeje]] || [[word:choyajeshe|choyajeshe]] || [[word:choyajeke|choyajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyajothotho|choyajothotho]] || [[word:choyajojojo|choyajojojo]] || [[word:choyajoshosho|choyajoshosho]] || [[word:choyajokoko|choyajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyajotho|choyajotho]] || [[word:choyajojo|choyajojo]] || [[word:choyajosho|choyajosho]] || [[word:choyajoko|choyajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyajofthof|choyajofthof]] || [[word:choyajofjof|choyajofjof]] || [[word:choyajofshof|choyajofshof]] || [[word:choyajofkof|choyajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfthĂŻf|choyajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfjĂŻf|choyajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfshĂŻf|choyajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfkĂŻf|choyajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|choyajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|choyajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|choyajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|choyajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfthĂŻf|choyajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfjĂŻf|choyajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfshĂŻf|choyajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfkĂŻf|choyajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfthĂŻf|choyajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfjĂŻf|choyajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfshĂŻf|choyajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:choyajĂŻfkĂŻf|choyajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyajĂŠthĂŠ|choyajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:choyajĂŠjĂŠ|choyajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:choyajĂŠshĂŠ|choyajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:choyajĂŠkĂŠ|choyajĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyajathatha|choyajathatha]] || [[word:choyajajaja|choyajajaja]] || [[word:choyajashasha|choyajashasha]] || [[word:choyajakaka|choyajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyajatha|choyajatha]] || [[word:choyajaja|choyajaja]] || [[word:choyajasha|choyajasha]] || [[word:choyajaka|choyajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyajafthaf|choyajafthaf]] || [[word:choyajafjaf|choyajafjaf]] || [[word:choyajafshaf|choyajafshaf]] || [[word:choyajafkaf|choyajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:choyajasha|choyajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:choyajshĂ«sha|choyajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choyajrosha|choyajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choyajmusha|choyajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:choyajyasha|choyajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoyajnkshĂ«sha|gochoyajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoyajnkrosha|gochoyajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoyajnkmusha|gochoyajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoyajnkyasha|gochoyajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:choyayajasha|choyayajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:choyayajshĂ«sha|choyayajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choyayajrosha|choyayajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choyayajmusha|choyayajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:choyayajyasha|choyayajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoyayajnkshĂ«sha|gochoyayajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoyayajnkrosha|gochoyayajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoyayajnkmusha|gochoyayajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoyayajnkyasha|gochoyayajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:cheyĂŠjasha|cheyĂŠjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:cheyĂŠjshĂ«sha|cheyĂŠjshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:cheyĂŠjrosha|cheyĂŠjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:cheyĂŠjmusha|cheyĂŠjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:cheyĂŠjyasha|cheyĂŠjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gocheyĂŠjnkshĂ«sha|gocheyĂŠjnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gocheyĂŠjnkrosha|gocheyĂŠjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gocheyĂŠjnkmusha|gocheyĂŠjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gocheyĂŠjnkyasha|gocheyĂŠjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:choyfajasha|choyfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:choyfajshĂ«sha|choyfajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choyfajrosha|choyfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choyfajmusha|choyfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:choyfajyasha|choyfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoyfajnkshĂ«sha|gochoyfajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoyfajnkrosha|gochoyfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoyfajnkmusha|gochoyfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoyfajnkyasha|gochoyfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
